2019May 12, 2019

🇫🇷 Toulouse, France

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Toulouse, France, May 12, 2019 -- May 17, 2019

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2019-05-toulouse-france

24 Resolutions

1017Plenary
Place JWG 8 on Standby
SC 4 requests its Committee Manager to notify SC 5 and ISO CS of the same and place JWG 8 on standby.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1016Plenary
Nominate SC 4 Liaison to TC 68/SC 8 and TC 68/SC 9
SC 4 requests liaison to ISO/TC 68/SC8 and SC9 and appoints Peter Benson as liaison officer from ISO/TC 184/SC 4.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1015Plenary
Establish Ad Hoc Group on Core industrial data set of terms
SC 4 establishes an Ad Hoc Group on Core industrial data set of terms and appoints Nils Sandsmark as Convenor to lead the team of Tor Arne Irgens, David Leal, Hiroshi Murayama, Allison Barnard Feen...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1014Plenary
Correct Title of ISO 8000-81
SC 4 requests its Committee Manager to inform ISO CS that the new title of ISO 8000-81 is "Data quality -- Part 81: Data quality assessment: Profiling".
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1013Plenary
Nominate SC 4 Liaison to JTC 1 Digital Twin AG
SC 4 acknowledges the report of JTC 1 N14262 and Resolution 20 and nominates Sangkeun Yoo to be a liaison to the digital twin advisory group in accordance with membership category 2.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1012Plenary
Convert ISO/PAS 17506 (COLLADA) to IS
SC 4 resolves to convert the ISO/PAS 17506 to an IS with no change in scope with target dates: DIS 2020-06-01, IS 2021-06-01.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1011Plenary
Establish PWI on Visualization elements of digital twins
SC 4 establishes a PWI to create a Technical Report on Visualization elements of digital twins.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1010Plenary
Establish PWI for Digital Validation by simulation
SC 4 establishes a PWI to create a Technical Report on Digital Validation by effective use of simulation.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1009Plenary
Request 9-month extension for ISO 10303-210ed4
SC 4 requests the ISO TMB to grant a 9-month extension to ISO 10303-210 ed4 in accordance with the justification provided.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1008Plenary
Move ISO 10303-243 to 48-month development track
SC 4 requests its Committee Manager to apply the 48-month development track to the ISO 10303-243 project.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1007Plenary
Establish Category A Liaison with ASM International
SC 4 welcomes the application of ASM International as a category A Liaison.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1006Plenary
Create Committee Innovation to evaluate continuous integration
SC 4 requests its Committee Manager submit a Committee Innovation proposal to the Living Lab task force requesting a committee innovation to evaluate continuous integration methods.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1005Plenary
Establish PWI for ISO 10303-239ed3
SC 4 requests its Committee Manager to establish a PWI for ISO 10303-239ed3.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1004Plenary
Cancel ISO 10303-239 ed3
SC 4 requests its Committee Manager cancel project ISO 10303-239 ed3.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1003Plenary
Cancel ISO 8000-63
SC 4 requests its Committee Manager to cancel ISO 8000-63 and, after receiving the appropriate documentation from WG 13, launch an NP Ballot of ISO 8000-63 to proceed to stage 40.00.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1002Plenary
Approve Project Leaders and Project Editors for SC 4 Projects
SC 4 approves the following Project Leaders and Project Editors for the associated Projects: |=== |Project |Working Group |Project Leader/Editor |ISO 8000-65 |WG 13 |Leader: Jean Brange |ISO TR 159...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"

Acclamation
SC 4 expresses thanks to Anne-Françoise Cutting-Decelle for her leadership and to the experts that contributed to the success of the work programme.

Acclamation

Acclamation

Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its thanks to Airbus for the excellent Airbus A380 assembly line tour and dinner afterwards.

Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its sincere appreciation to Howard Mason for 35 years of dedicated service and consummate leadership of ISO/TC 184/SC 4. During this time, Howard spent 17 years as Chairman of SC 4, ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
